title: AI-assisted CodeGrind: New Problem-Solving Help & Sign-In Enhancements
summary: Highlighting the Azure OpenAI-enabled AI assistant and Google authentication update, plus a quick tour of improved problem-solving guidance within CodeGrind.
core_message: CodeGrind now features an Azure OpenAI-powered AI assistant for problem‑solving guidance and a streamlined login with Google authentication, enhancing secure access and learning efficiency without leaving the editor.
cta: Try the new AI assistant in the editor and sign in with Google to unlock personalized progress tracking today.
visual_brief: A short screen-recorded walkthrough: showing the CodeGrind editor with the AI assistant panel, an example problem being solved, live AI hints, and the Google sign-in flow, concluding with a quick recap of features and a CTA to log in.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

linkedin.text: CodeGrind introduces an Azure OpenAI-powered AI assistant to guide problem solving and a streamlined Google authentication flow for secure access. The updated editor experience includes in-editor hints, improved problem-solving guidance, and a smoother sign-in process. Try the new AI assistant in the editor and sign in with Google to unlock personalized progress tracking today. Learn more: https://codegrind.online
